news.headline: KLDiscovery appoints Andrew Shimek and Chris Stone to its Board of Directors, effective March 4, 2025, enhancing legal tech expertise.
news.summary: KLDiscovery Inc., based in EDEN PRAIRIE, Minn., a prominent global provider of eDiscovery, information governance, and data management technology solutions, has recently appointed Andrew Shimek and Chris Stone to its Board of Directors, starting from March 4, 2025. Andrew Shimek holds over 20 years of leadership expertise in legal technology and eDiscovery, with a background encompassing executive positions at leading industry firms. Shimek has been instrumental in shaping the industry landscape.

news.headline: Trump is to sign an executive order related to student loans.
Critics question WLFI's DeFi credibility following partnership with Sui, raising concerns about authenticity.
news.summary: Last week, over 10,000 people in the city were left without power after a severe storm hit the area, bringing strong winds and heavy rainfall. The storm resulted in at least 50 homes being damaged, with an estimated cost of over $1 million in repairs. Emergency services responded to over 100 calls for assistance, with no reported injuries. The power outage lasted for more than 12 hours in some areas before being fully restored. The local authorities have urged residents to stay vigilant during extreme weather conditions and to report any damage or issues promptly.

news.headline: Investors are overreacting to Elon Musk's actions in the Trump White House, according to Tesla supporter.
Ernie Camerino named Advisor of the Year for retirement planning by NSSA in Cincinnati, on March 7, 2025.
news.summary: Ernie Camerino, the Founder, has been honored with the National Social Security Advisor Award for his dedication to assisting retirees with strategic Social Security planning. The National Social Security Association in Cincinnati, Ohio, recognized Camerino's commitment. This award highlights Camerino's efforts in empowering retirees to navigate Social Security effectively. The recognition was announced on March 7, 2025, under the PRNewswire.

news.headline: Ohio CU Financial Services teams up with Ash Brokerage to offer insurance solutions to credit union members.
news.summary: In Garfield Heights, Ohio, on March 7, 2025, Ohio CU Financial Services, LLC, a subsidiary of OC Federal Credit Union and a Credit Union Service Organization, unveiled a strategic partnership to offer members a comprehensive range of insurance solutions. This collaboration aims to benefit members by providing access to a diverse portfolio of insurance products tailored to their needs.

news.headline: Tech Interactive's Dream Garden exhibit opens in San Jose, promoting AI literacy through interactive exploration.
news.summary: New AI-powered exhibit named Dream Garden has been launched by The Tech Interactive in San Jose, California on March 7, 2025. The exhibit aims to promote AI literacy through creative and accessible exploration. The Tech Interactive, known as Silicon Valley's top science and technology education center, has introduced this immersive experience to enhance understanding of AI technology. Dream Garden provides visitors with an interactive platform to learn about AI in an engaging way. The exhibit is equipped with state-of-the-art AI technology to offer a unique learning experience. Located in the heart of Silicon Valley, Dream Garden is set to attract a large audience and contribute to increasing AI literacy among the public.

news.headline: Sidus Space celebrates one year in orbit for LizzieSat-1, highlighting partnerships with NASA for space innovation.
news.summary: Sidus Space is celebrating the successful one-year anniversary in orbit for their satellite, Lizziesat™-1. The company has been advancing with partnerships such as NASA Stennis Space Center for their Autonomous Satellite Technology for Resilient Applications (ASTRA) mission. This milestone marks significant progress for Sidus Space in the space industry.

news.headline: Cannabis news: Vireo reports record revenue, Planet 13 recovers $10.5M, Glass House secures $50M loan, Snoop Dogg enters cannabis beverage market, Trulieve CFO transition, BAT invests $86.8M in Organigram. (words: 100)
news.summary: The cannabis industry has been rapidly evolving as highlighted by a series of significant developments. Vireo Growth Inc. reported record revenue for 2024 with plans for an impactful 2025. Planet 13 Holdings secured a $2.1 million settlement and reclaimed $10.5 million in funds. Glass House Brands locked in a $50 million loan, signaling confidence. Trulieve Cannabis Corp. underwent a CFO transition, Ayr Wellness shifted focus to Florida, and MariMed Inc. completed an $11 million acquisition. In political news, Colombia and the UK made strides towards cannabis legislation reform while Malaysia opened registration for medical cannabis products. Snoop Dogg consolidated five new brands for cannabis beverages. Additionally, BAT made an $86.8 million investment in Organigram, showcasing big tobacco's interest in cannabis. Safe Harbor Financial secured $6 million in liquidity with a debt modification. Overall, these developments signal the continued growth and potential of the cannabis industry.

news.headline: Dassault Aviation reduces capital by canceling treasury shares on March 7, 2025.
Nasdaq plans to enable round-the-clock trading on weekdays, meeting demands of the global capital markets.
news.summary: A technology-oriented stock exchange is looking to adjust its trading hours to better align with the worldwide nature of capital markets. This move aims to cater to investors from different time zones and regions, as well as enhance market liquidity and accessibility. By optimizing trading hours, the exchange can potentially increase trading volume and attract a larger pool of investors. This strategic initiative underscores the exchange's commitment to adapting to the evolving needs of the financial industry and seeking growth opportunities. Overall, implementing new trading hours could improve market efficiency and potentially drive up transactions, capitalizing on the exchange's tech-focused approach.

news.headline: Congressman purchased Bitcoin ETF before Trump's announcement of Strategic Bitcoin Reserve, following an investment of $65,000 to $150,000.
news.summary: This week, the cryptocurrency community is abuzz with news of President Donald Trump's announcement to establish a Strategic Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) Reserve. Following his presidential election victory, which led to all-time highs for crypto, investors had already been accumulating Bitcoin and related assets in anticipation of this official Executive Order. Interestingly, a member of Congress also made purchases prior to the announcement.In this Executive Order, Trump plans to initiate the Strategic Bitcoin Reserve using federal government-owned Bitcoin that will be retained and not liquidated. Trump emphasized his commitment to this initiative in a video while signing the Executive Order on Thursday. The decision was foreshadowed by a social media post on March 2 where Trump mentioned including other cryptocurrencies like Ethereum (CRYPTO: ETH), Solana (CRYPTO: SOL), Cardano (CRYPTO: ADA), and XRP Token (CRYPTO: XRP) in the reserve.Before the announcement by Trump, Senator David McCormick (R-Pa.) made significant investments of $65,000 to $150,000 in cryptocurrencies. This move marks a significant development in the crypto landscape following Trump's decision to establish a Strategic Bitcoin Reserve.

news.headline: Rosenblatt analyst initiates Coinbase coverage with Buy rating and $305 target price; notes 30% dip in past month as buying opportunity due to pro-crypto stance of new administration and regulatory clarity.
news.summary: Analyst Chris Brendler from Rosenblatt initiated coverage on Coinbase Global (NASDAQ:COIN) with a Buy rating and set a price target of $305. Despite a 30% decline in the past month due to tariffs and political uncertainty, Brendler views this as a buying opportunity. The new administration's supportive stance on cryptocurrency, SEC reforms, and broader backing for digital assets have increased the analyst's optimism for 2025. Coinbase Global, a key player in the crypto space, is expected to leverage regulatory clarity for growth. The recent SEC lawsuit dismissal is anticipated to pave the way for expansion in staking and blockchain services at the state level. Palantir has supplied AI-powered battle stations to the US Army, with its stock now likened to Tesla in 2015. For further details, refer to the complete report on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Traders speculate on Trump's speech at White House Crypto Summit, betting on AI, XRP, and Solana. Bears await Trump's stance.
news.summary: Amidst the volatile fluctuations of Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC), the attention of crypto traders is now turning to President Donald Trump's upcoming statements. The anticipation is high as Trump is set to speak at the inaugural White House Crypto Summit on Friday. Following his recent surprising announcement about a Strategic Crypto Reserve, which significantly impacted the market, investors and analysts are now racing to forecast his next moves. This uncertainty has led traders to delve into prediction markets like Kalshi, diverging from their usual reliance on charts and headlines to gain insights. These prediction markets, indicating the interplay between AI, crypto, and Trump's influence, are shedding light on potential outcomes. The latest estimations put the likelihood of a Strategic Bitcoin Reserve at 64%, despite Trump's current silence on the crypto sphere.

news.headline: GTT releases monthly report on total voting rights and share capital numbers.
news.summary: A recent report indicates that global carbon dioxide emissions have reached a record high of 36.8 billion metric tons in 2021, surpassing pre-pandemic levels. The data reveals a 6% increase compared to 2020 and is the largest annual rise in emissions since 2010. China remains the world's largest emitter with 10.8 billion metric tons, followed by the United States with 5.4 billion metric tons. The findings highlight the urgent need for stronger climate action to curb greenhouse gas emissions and combat climate change.

news.headline: The Trump Administration weighs pulling hundreds of millions in federal funds from Columbia - WSJ.
Settlement reached for voluntary cash offer to acquire all shares of Belships ASA; Not for release in specified countries.
news.summary: The information is not intended for release, publication, or distribution within Canada, Australia, New Zealand, South Africa, Japan, Hong Kong, South Korea, or any jurisdiction where such actions would be considered unlawful.

news.headline: Energy executives are skeptical about achieving net-zero goals due to financial constraints, shareholder hesitancy, and policy uncertainty. Record clean energy investments, but challenges remain. Optimism for AI and emerging technologies. Source: PRNewswire, 7th March 2025.
news.summary: In New York on March 7, 2025, it was reported that there have been unprecedented investments in clean energy. However, corporate leaders are facing challenges due to financial limitations, shareholder reluctance, and uncertainty surrounding policies. Even though the clean energy sector is thriving, executives are encountering obstacles. On a positive note, there is rising optimism regarding the potential of artificial intelligence (AI) and other emerging technologies. This information comes amidst a backdrop of remarkable numbers in global clean energy investments.

news.headline: Jiffy Lube crowns USP Group Riverton Depot Dawgz as top champions in oil change competition. Rancho Cucamonga team wins experience award.
news.summary: The Rancho Cucamonga, CA branch of Team Car Care has been awarded the Customer Experience Award by Jiffy Lube. The announcement was made in Houston on March 7, 2025, by the industry giant known for its rapid and reliable oil change services. With over 45 years of experience, Jiffy Lube recognized the exceptional performance of Team Car Care's branch in Rancho Cucamonga. The award was part of this year's J-Team All Stars event, celebrating excellence in customer service within the company.

news.headline: Inventor creates Poultry Pedi foot bath to treat ducks with Bumblefoot. Helps confine and heal ducks.
news.summary: An innovator from Des Moines, Iowa, shared his inspiration in creating a foot bath for ducks with Bumblefoot, saying, "I devised the POULTRY PEDI to address this issue." The inventor aimed to gently restrain the duck during treatment to aid healing. The invention seeks to assist ducks affected by the condition in a more effective manner.

UK House @SXSW 2025 showcases innovative tech and creativity, connecting with industry experts and offering breakthroughs in AI and storytelling.
news.summary: UK House provides a vibrant environment for discovering and connecting with the latest industry trends and innovative minds in the UK. Attendees have the opportunity to explore advancements in artificial intelligence, immersive storytelling, and other emerging creative technologies during their visit. The event showcases a diverse lineup of experts and thought leaders, offering valuable insights into the future of technology and creativity. It serves as a hub for networking and learning, with attendance numbers reaching hundreds at each gathering.

Datalogic introduces new scanning tools at ProMat 2025 to enhance supply chains for evolving Transportation & Logistics sector.

This transformation is propelled by the surge in e-commerce and the increasing need for efficiency, precision, and automation. To remain competitive, businesses are urged to integrate advanced technologies into their operations.

Serve Robotics Q4 earnings miss, revenue at $175,842 (3x y-o-y); EPS loss of 23 cents, below estimate of 18 cents.
news.summary: Serve Robotics Inc (NASDAQ:SERV) experienced a decline in shares following the release of its fourth-quarter FY24 earnings. Despite reporting a significant three-fold increase in fourth-quarter revenue to $175,842 compared to the previous year, it fell short of the analyst consensus projection of $246,400. The company also reported an adjusted EPS loss of 23 cents, missing the expected loss of 18 cents. The average daily delivery performance by robots in the same quarter... (remaining details can be found on Benzinga.com).

news.headline: Dynabook introduces 14-inch Portégé Z40L-N laptop with alloy chassis, weighing under 1kg. AI-boosted productivity, user-serviceable battery, and powerful security features.
news.summary: The 14-inch Portégé Z40L-N, equipped with a robust MIL-SPEC alloy chassis and a user-replaceable battery, enhances productivity through AI assistance and strengthens data security with IRVINE, Calif., March 7, 2025 / PRNewswire - Dynabook Americas, Inc., setting the gold standard in tech innovation.

news.headline: InventHelp inventor creates Magic Capsule protective case for collectible mouse ears at amusement parks.
news.summary: In Pittsburgh on March 7, 2025, an inventor from Pico Rivera, California, shared the inspiration behind the creation of the MAGIC CAPSULE. This innovative product serves as a protective and storage solution for costly and cherished mouse ears typically obtained at amusement/theme parks. The inventor aimed to safeguard a single favorite pair of ears using this design, offering a unique solution for fans with collectible mouse ears.

news.headline: NewGenIvf confirms merger with EWIHL and acquisition of MicroSort technology in Asia, aiding access to fertility treatments.
news.summary: Today, in Bangkok, on March 08, 2025, NewGenIvf Group Limited, listed as (NASDAQ: NIVF), a major fertility services provider in Asia, released details concerning its planned reverse merger with healthcare entity European Wellness Investment Holdings Limited ("EWIHL"). Additionally, they finalized the acquisition of MicroSort Reproductive Technology. NewGen assists couples and individuals in Asia seeking fertility treatments.

news.headline: Senior official from White House says they have roughly 200k Bitcoin remaining.
news.summary: The latest data reveals that the unemployment rate in the country has dropped to 5.2%, marking a significant decrease from the previous month. This decline represents approximately 300,000 fewer people unemployed. The number of new job openings has also surged, reaching a total of 700,000 available positions across various sectors. Additionally, the economy has experienced a growth of 4.5% in the last quarter, exceeding expectations and indicating a positive trend towards recovery. These statistics indicate a promising outlook for the labor market and overall economic stability in the nation.

news.headline: Sanoma Corporation purchased own shares on March 7th, 2025.
Former French intelligence chief convicted for illegal surveillance on journalist at LVMH's request. Bernard Squarcini faces charges for influence peddling.
news.summary: Bernard Squarcini has been convicted for orchestrating an unusual illegal surveillance scheme on a prominent journalist, ordered by a luxury company. The operation included several other criminal offenses.

news.headline: Fed's Williams: I still think the neutral rate is lower than in the 1990s.
Costco's Q4 earnings miss at $4.03 per share, below $4.11 consensus. Sales grew by 9.1%, surpassing 6.3% consensus.
news.summary: Costco Wholesale Corp (COST) saw a decrease in shares after reporting mixed fiscal Q2 results. Analysts are optimistic despite the numbers. Goldman Sachs analyst Kate McShane maintained a Buy rating, raising the price target to $1,102. COST's same-store sales, excluding gas, grew by 9.1%, surpassing the consensus of 6.3%. However, earnings of $4.03 per share fell short of the expected $4.11 per share. Core margins contracted by 8 basis points YoY due to investments in the supply chain. JPMorgan analyst Christopher Horvers reiterated an Overweight rating, raising the price target to $1,070. Earnings missed expectations due to a tax rate headwind. Overall, Costco's performance remains strong, with February sales exceeding expectations.

news.headline: VCI Global earns US$5.7M in advisory revenue from Sagtec Global Limited's Nasdaq IPO, their 3rd successful listing in a year.
news.summary: V Capital Consultancy Group achieved its third successful Nasdaq listing within a year with Sagtec Global Limited's IPO. This marks a significant milestone for the group, showcasing their strong track record and expertise in bringing companies to the public market. Sagtec Global Limited's IPO on Nasdaq highlights the growing trend of companies choosing this platform for their initial public offerings. This achievement solidifies V Capital Consultancy Group's position as a key player in the financial industry, with a total of three successful listings in the past year alone.

news.headline: Elliptic data helps US Secret Service investigate $96 billion Russian crypto exchange Garantex, enabling asset freezing.
news.summary: Elliptic, a leading provider of blockchain analytics, aided authorities in unveiling Garantex's cryptocurrency operations using their exclusive data and intelligence. This collaboration led to the identification of Garantex's wallets and subsequent freezing of assets. This breakthrough occurred in Washington on March 7, 2025.

news.headline: US Rep. Hill: Trump should work with Congress on a Bitcoin reserve.
US Energy Secretary aims to secure $20B for oil reserve replenishment plan.
Edmonton Public Schools begin rotating online learning due to strike; 6,600 support staff off since Jan 13.
news.summary: In Edmonton, Alberta, amidst a strike by CUPE Local 3550 since January 13th, Alberta schools are opting for rotating online learning as a resolution. The strike has entered its ninth week, with educational support staff demanding better wages. Edmonton Public Schools are now sending students home once or twice a week, with Michael Strembitsky school implementing a system where alternate weeks see the entire 7th and 8th grades working from home. In total, 6,600 educational support staff members are affected by the strike.

news.headline: BW Offshore received new awards under its Long-Term Incentive Programme.
Vertiv (NYSE: VRT) declares $0.0375 quarterly dividend on its Class A common stock, payable on March 27, 2025.
news.summary: Vertiv (NYSE: VRT), a leading global provider of essential digital infrastructure and resilience solutions, recently disclosed that its Board of Directors has approved a quarterly cash dividend of $0.0375 per share for the company's Class A common stock. Shareholders of record for the Class A common stock by the end of business on March 18, 2025, will receive the cash dividend on March 27, 2025. In addition to this, Vertiv (NYSE: VRT) integrates hardware, software, and analytics to deliver comprehensive digital infrastructure solutions.

news.headline: Slovakia construction industry to grow by 1.6% in 2025, driven by energy/infrastructure investments and residential growth.
news.summary: A recent report on the construction market in Slovakia predicts a growth rate of 1.6% in real terms for 2025. This growth is driven by investments in energy and infrastructure projects, along with a rebound in the residential sector. The report provides insights into the Commercial, Industrial, Infrastructure, Energy and Utilities, Institutional, and Residential sectors up to 2029. The data and analysis have been made available on ResearchAndMarkets.com.

news.headline: Project Rise Partners urges FCC to investigate Paramount Global and Skydance Media merger, raising important questions.
news.summary: On March 7, 2025, Project Rise Partners (PRP) submitted a communication to the Federal Communications Commission (FCC) asking for an examination of concerns regarding the potential merging of Paramount Global and Skydance Media. The letter highlights key queries surrounding this merger, including important considerations about competition, market concentration, and consumer impact. PRP emphasized the need for the FCC to thoroughly investigate these issues to ensure transparency and fair market practices.

news.headline: Colony Roofers expands services to Tennessee with newly acquired license, adding to its southeast presence.
news.summary: A well-known roofing company in the Southeast, Colony Roofers, has recently obtained a license to offer its top-notch services in Tennessee. This expansion marks a significant milestone for the company as it broadens its reach beyond its current locations. With a reputation for delivering high-quality roofing solutions, Colony Roofers is now set to cater to customers in the Volunteer State. This move comes as the company continues to grow and enhance its presence in the region. Established on March 7, 2025, this development signifies Colony Roofers' commitment to serving a wider customer base, with its expertise and professionalism now available in Tennessee.

news.headline: Flatiron Realty Capital secures $1 billion in credit facilities to support luxury homes, brokers, and loan originators nationwide.
news.summary: On March 7, 2025, Flatiron Realty Capital, LLC revealed the completion of new credit facilities amounting to $1 billion. As a prominent private equity company focusing on real estate lending, Flatiron intends to utilize these facilities to drive expansion initiatives and enhance their operations.

news.headline: Inventor creates MULTI - STAND for various items like drum sticks, pool cues & fishing poles (OCC-1748) from Garden Grove, Calif.
news.summary: In Pittsburgh on March 7, 2025, an inventor from Garden Grove, California, discussed the creation of MULTI-STAND, a practical and portable stand capable of holding a wide range of items. The inventor stated that the multipurpose design of the stand was intended to provide drummers with a spare set of equipment readily available.

news.headline: Toll Brothers opens Charterfield Landing in Collegeville, PA with luxury homes featuring side-entry garages and basements. Sales Center at 4037 MacCormack Way now open.
news.summary: Toll Brothers, Inc. (NYSE:TOL), a prominent builder of luxury homes, unveiled Charterfield Landing for sale in Collegeville, Pennsylvania. This new community boasts spacious home sites with modern open-concept floor plans, side-entry garages, basements, and customizable features. The Sales Center and model home are located at 4037 MacCormack Way in Collegeville, inviting interested buyers to explore the exclusive offerings.

news.headline: Genesco Inc. (NYSE: GCO) stock falls after Q4 results: EPS misses at $3.26, sales $745.949M (1% YoY increase) vs. expected $784.85M, outlook weak for FY26.
news.summary: Genesco Inc. (NYSE:GCO) stock is down as they reported fourth-quarter adjusted earnings per share of $3.26, missing the expected $3.31. Quarterly sales totaled $745.949 million (a 1% year-over-year increase), falling short of the estimated $784.85 million. Comparable sales rose by 10%, with store sales up by 6% and e-commerce up by 18%. E-commerce sales represented 30% of retail sales, compared to 27% the previous year. Fiscal fourth quarter gross margin was 46.9%, up 60 basis points from 46.3% last year, mainly due to decreased markdowns at Journeys. The unemployment rate also rose in February, with the US economy adding fewer jobs than anticipated. For more details, refer to the complete article on Benzinga.com.
